terms.short: Architecture using self-attention to process sequences in parallel
Mechanism that lets models focus on relevant parts of input
Smallest unit of text processed by a model (word, subword, or character)
Dense vector representation of text/data in continuous space
Adapting a pre-trained model to a specific task with additional training
Retrieval-Augmented Generation — combining search with text generation
When AI generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect content
Crafting inputs to get desired outputs from AI models
Controls randomness in output — low=deterministic, high=creative
Sampling from top cumulative probability mass
Maximum amount of text a model can process at once
Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback — aligning AI with human preferences
Low-Rank Adaptation — efficient fine-tuning by training small adapter layers
Reducing model precision (32-bit→4-bit) to save memory and speed up inference
Mixture of Experts — routing inputs to specialized sub-networks
Generates images by gradually denoising random noise
Generative Adversarial Network — generator vs discriminator training
Variational Autoencoder — learns compressed latent representations
Performing tasks without any task-specific examples
Learning from a handful of examples provided in the prompt
Prompting models to show reasoning steps before answering
Running a trained model to generate predictions/outputs
Measures how well a model predicts text — lower is better
Measures translation quality by comparing to reference translations
Harmonic mean of precision and recall
Model memorizes training data instead of learning general patterns
Number of training examples processed before updating weights
How much to adjust weights during training — too high=unstable, too low=slow
Optimization algorithm that minimizes loss by following the slope
Measures how wrong the model's predictions are
Converts raw scores into probabilities that sum to 1
Measures angle between vectors — 1=identical, 0=unrelated, -1=opposite
Standardized test to compare model capabilities (MMLU, HumanEval, etc.)
Making AI systems behave according to human values and intentions
Prompts designed to bypass AI safety filters
Deliberately trying to make AI fail to find vulnerabilities
AI that can plan, use tools, and take autonomous actions
AI calling external functions/APIs to accomplish tasks
AI that processes multiple input types (text, images, audio, video)
